primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
note: a=15 (3|15, 9 not divides 15, 15 mod 9 = 6); Satellite opens, Singularity absent. Witnesses the mul_3_not_9 branch for 15 mod 9 = 6 (distinct from a=21 mod 9 = 3).
